title: Introduction to Machine Learning

prerequisites.text: STA2004F, STA2005S and (MAM2010F, MAM2011F, MAM2012S and MAM2014S) strongly recommended. Co-requisites: STA3048S. Note: A student cannot obtain credits for both STA3043S and (STA3047S + STA3048S).

outline: Machine learning topics include: a basic introduction to statistical learning paradigms, applications of regression and classification trees, and a primer on feedforward neural networks and backpropagation.
lecture_times: Monday - Friday, 1st period (see departmental entry). Two practicals per week.
dp_requirements: Satisfactory attendance of lectures, tutorials, practicals and tests and completion of assignments and/or class exercises as set out in course outline.
